reviews.comment:
Todos los ACA me gustan, por eso soy socia, pero este tiene la dificultad del baño cerrado todo el tiempo. Ante una emergencia sanitaria hay que dar mil vueltas para obtener la llave de los mismos.

(Translated by Google)
I like all ACAs, which is why I'm a member, but this one has the drawback of the bathroom being locked all the time. In a health emergency, you have to go around in circles trying to get the key.
